response.original_title: En bici por la Lima del Pariacaca
response.overview: Daniel Martinez and Erika Pomareda are a married couple who share a passion for adventure and the outdoors. Three years ago, still very much in love, they decided to embark on one of their greatest adventures: crossing the Andes Mountains on their bicycles. Both are audiovisual communicators, so they decided to document their entire experience with photos and videos. They set off from the coast, carrying enough equipment for a 15-day journey, reaching altitudes of 5,400 meters above sea level, sleeping wherever night fell, and finding themselves completely alone in the heart of the Andes. The adventure lasted 12 days.
response.title: En bici por la Lima del Pariacaca
